projects.title: Social Content — Instagram Reels

projects.title: Video Aspect Ratio Control
projects.desc: Add per-platform aspect ratio control so horizontal videos can preserve their original ratio instead of always cropping to 9x16. You'll be able to choose the best format for each platform — vertical for Instagram/TikTok, original for YouTube/Facebook.

deliverables.name: Ratio toggle per platform in Social Captions tool

projects.title: Social Auto-Post Integration
projects.desc: Connect Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Gmail so generated content posts automatically — no manual download/upload. This requires API approvals from Meta and TikTok. We're scoping the timeline and will update you before we start.
